articles.author: Zack Whittaker
articles.title: US government warns of severe CopyFail bug affecting major versions of Linux - TechCrunch
articles.description: U.S. cybersecurity agency CISA says the CopyFail bug is being actively used in hacking campaigns, and poses a major risk to servers and data centers that rely on Linux.
articles.content: A severe security vulnerability affecting almost every version of the Linux operating system has caught defenders off-guard and scrambling to patch after security researchers publicly released exploi… [+3217 chars]

articles.author: Julian Chokkattu
articles.title: This Company Has Figured Out a Way to Make Face ID Invisible - WIRED
articles.description: Metalenz’s Polar ID face-scanning technology works even when the camera is hidden under the display.
articles.content:
We're all too familiar with the notchthe unsightly cut-in that graced many smartphones for years, like the iPhone X or the LG G7.
